arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Hull City LIVE: Kick-off time, TV channel and team news
arts.sum: The Bluebirds welcome the Tigers in another big match at the bottom of the Championship table

arts.ttl: Hull City's relegation chances assessed ahead of crunch Cardiff City showdown
arts.sum: Betfred now suggests Argyle, Luton, Derby, Cardiff, Oxford and Stoke all have a greater chance of being dumped in League One in the remaining weeks of the season than the Tigers, who have been given a fourteen per cent chance of going down, though that would change again if they fail to win in South Wales. Their success at the weekend was aided by defeats for Luton Town, Derby County, Stoke City and Oxford United, while Cardiff and Plymouth Argyle played out a 1-1 draw at Home Park

Edwards Coaches operate a large portfolio of work beside corporate contacts and team transport. The company are marking their anniversary in various ways, including hosting a family fun Open Day at their Headquarters at Parc Busnes Edwards in Llantrisant, opposite the Royal Mint, on the 3rd of August.

arts.ttl: Hull City's predicted starting XI to tackle Cardiff City six-pointer as Louie Barry question posed
arts.sum: Lincoln came off the bench at the Stadium of Light to make his Championship bow and grew into the contest, and he could be in line for a first start as the Tigers look to back up their tremendous win in the North East, and take a huge step towards securing a place in next season’s Champions League. Hughes’ inclusion gave City added solidity and helped Alfie Jones look more comfortable, while up front, Kyle Joseph got through a huge amount of work and his tireless running forced Luke O’Nein to give away a cheap corner from which the Tigers scored the winning goal.

Cardiff defended well against relegation rivals Plymouth on Saturday despite going down to 10 men with over half an hour to play, although a draw will still be a frustrating result for Ömer Riza's sid...

arts.ttl: Hull City's growing connection as Tigers challenged to prove they are a 'real football team'
arts.sum: Now is the time for us to show that we are a real football team, that we have our own ambitions, and that we can put two performances together because then, at the end of those games, the result will take care of itself. Ruben Selles believes there's a growing connection between his Hull City team and the supporters, as he looks for his side to prove how good they can be at Cardiff City on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Lincoln decision made: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Cardiff City
arts.sum: Hull City are back in action on Wednesday night with an away trip to Wales to face Cardiff… The post Lincoln decision made: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Cardiff City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Hull City ace lays down key demand of Tigers against rivals Cardiff City
arts.sum: "For sure (Important to back then Sunderland result up), like I said, to make this win beautiful, you have to win the next game. Eliot Matazo says three points at Cardiff City tonight would cap off a tremendous few days and make Saturday's win at Sunderland beautiful, though he admits defeat against the Bluebirds would see their efforts in the North East wasted.

arts.ttl: Hull City have huge chance to take big safety step they cannot afford to pass up
arts.sum: City play their game in hand on Tuesday night in South Wales, and victory against the Bluebirds would move them six points clear of the drop zone, and that could increase a week later when Argyle visit the MKM Stadium. Saturday's 1-0 win at Sunderland was huge in many ways, and given results elsewhere, could prove pivotal in the quest for Championship survival.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cardiff City vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Championship clash between Cardiff City and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
